trigger_condition.description: Scale position size inversely to 5-day ATR; only enter when 5-day ATR < 20-day ATR

sizing_rule.note: Risk 2% of equity per trade scaled by volatility (5-day ATR). Position size = (2% equity) / (5-day ATR × multiplier). Volatility filter requires contraction (5d ATR < 20d ATR) before entry.

source_rule_text: Size positions by dividing total account risk (as a percentage of equity) by the volatility-adjusted stop distance, scaled by the contract/instrument multiplier.
